title: AI-DLC Rule Index (emitted rule-index.json)
description: OUTPUT schema for the emitted rule-index.json (PACK-04 / D-05). The per-record (and per-superseded-item) additionalProperties:false is RESEARCH body-leak guard #2: there is no property a Markdown body/content key could occupy, so validateIndex rejects any index that carries a leaked body. Trigger internals are validated by the frontmatter schema (01-02) at load time; this output schema only asserts triggers is an object so it does not duplicate or drift from that contract.

schemaVersion.description: On-disk index schema version. Bumped only on a breaking index-shape change.

rules.description: One record per resolved precedence winner. Summaries + pointers only — never a body.

ruleRecord.description: A single index record. additionalProperties:false is the no-body guard (D-05 / PACK-04) — no place for a body/content key to live.

triggers.description: Multi-axis trigger object. Field-internal validation is owned by the frontmatter schema (01-02); this output schema asserts only that it is an object so the two contracts cannot drift.

summary.description: One-line injected summary — the only prose the index carries.

sourceFile.description: Repo-relative POSIX pointer to the rule file (Pitfall 5).

enforcement.description: Optional named contract id (required upstream when classification is binding — D-15).

detailPath.description: Optional pointer to a detail file, carried verbatim (D-06). Never resolved in Phase 1 (D-07/D-08 deferred to Phase 3).

superseded.description: Cross-tier losers of a same-id collision (D-11), recorded not dropped.

supersededRecord.description: A superseded loser under the winner (D-11). Pointers only — additionalProperties:false keeps a body out here too.
